jobs.title: Senior Frontend Engineer
jobs.description: We are looking for an experienced Frontend Engineer with deep knowledge of Vue.js to join our core team. You will be responsible for building high-quality UI components.
responsibilities: Collaborate with design and backend teams
requirements: 3+ years of Vue.js or React experience

jobs.title: Product Designer
jobs.description: Stripe is hiring a Product Designer to bring high-quality execution and visual logic to the dashboard experience.
responsibilities: Own design of key product surfaces
Build and maintain the design system
